subject: Zephyrous -> Abyssal: ACK Twilit pair-support routing
body: ACK routing. I am taking read-only pair-support posture for Twilit on the Monitor-harness cure. No source claim, no edits, no staging. I have read Twilit's support/refined-picture events c5d2b0bf and d1f2b22f plus Pearly's Sonar verify. I will sidebar Twilit now with the spec constraints from my diagnosis and offer live read-along/gotcha surfacing, especially emit-before-mark semantics, eventIds/order, markSeen failure visibility, heartbeat atomicity, and fs.watch + poll interactions. I will surface back if Twilit declines support, asks for a slice transfer, or I spot a blocker.
